prompts: Cinematic wide shot in a warm, wooden Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library. Natsu Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, and Natsu Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf-shaped brooch, stand facing each other. They raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice. Soft, glowing mana ribbons begin to weave between their palms. Readable, cooperative body motion, no text, no watermarks, consistent lighting.

Same continuous shot in the arcane library. Natsu Dawncrest and Natsu Moonvale maintain their positions. Natsu Moonvale slightly adjusts their hand position, causing the soft, glowing mana ribbons to stabilize and form a steady, harmonious loop between both characters. Calm, focused teamwork. No combat, no harm, no text, no watermarks, consistent character appearance and environment throughout.
